text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! You came at the perfect time!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Grr, I haven't chomped at anyone today, and it's
starting to get to me... Hehe, lemme take a big ol'
bite out of you!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: C'mere! Don't even try to get away from Windy!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Hey, if you actually don't even try to put up a fight, it takes the fun out of it! Act more afraid!
